title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarked mixed-provider LLM workflows, testing whether Claude Opus or Kimi K2.6 should handle planning versus implementation in automated code generation. Using Archon, he ran four configurations against real GitHub issues and scored outputs on seven dimensions including correctness and code quality. Results inform optimal provider allocation for the Dark Factory automated PR system.
